metric_name: Core AI team attrition among supported firms
notes: Primary dashboard success metric for Recommendation 1. Implementation-retention metric, not a competitiveness KPI.

metric_name: % of subsidized pilots converting to paid commercial contracts
source: ISED 2024-25 Departmental Results Report; PROBLEM AND RECOMMENDATION 1&2.pptx
notes: Current baseline is proxied using Innovative Solutions Canada's Pathway to Commercialization: 11 contracts and 44 eligible innovations in 2024-25, implying ~25% contract conversion. Closest available federal analogue; not AI-only.

metric_name: % of credit-subsidized deployments converting to multi-year commercial contracts
source: ISED 2024-25 Departmental Results Report; PROBLEM AND RECOMMENDATION 3.pdf
notes: Current baseline uses the same federal first-buyer analogue as R2: 11 contracts and 44 eligible innovations in Innovative Solutions Canada's Pathway to Commercialization in 2024-25, implying ~25% conversion. Closest available benchmark; not AI-only and not tax-credit-specific.

metric_name: Pre-qualified Canadian AI scale-ups in launch registry
source: ISED 2024-25 Departmental Results Report; PROBLEM AND RECOMMENDATION 3.pdf
notes: Current baseline uses the number of innovations made eligible for procurement through Innovative Solutions Canada's Pathway to Commercialization in 2024-25. Official figure is all-sector, not AI-only.

metric_name: Pre-launch procurement deals signed under AnchorAdopter program
source: ISED 2024-25 Departmental Results Report; PROBLEM AND RECOMMENDATION 3.pdf
notes: Current baseline uses the number of Pathway to Commercialization contracts awarded in 2024-25. Closest federal analogue to first-buyer/anchor-adopter deals; not AI-only.
